positive: A minimalist line-art composition featuring a stylized, celestial-themed geometric floral pattern. The design is centered on a constellation of abstract stars and crescent moons interspersed with clean, flowing filigree mandalas. The style is modern bohemian and ethereal, using a restricted palette of deep indigo blue, metallic gold, and matte cream. The composition should be highly scalable, offering strong contrast and clean silhouettes suitable for a chest print on fabric. Use thin, elegant linework with an intricate yet simple feel, emphasizing negative space.
negative: blurry, noise, grainy, low resolution, text, watermark, signatures, logos, copyright, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, busy
